parts.name: S.Trs HAs-R Framed Armor Plate
parts.desc:
Dimensions: 1x1

Armor plate scavenged from Imperial cruisers. Strong enough to withstand a couple of hits. Sloped to improve protection and the likelihood of ricochet. Due to the design specifics, it is not subject to field repairs. This placement provides an additional angle, increasing the chance of ricochet from new directions.

parts.name: S.Trs HAs Framed Armor Plate
parts.desc:
Dimensions: 1x1

Armor plate scavenged from Imperial cruisers. Strong enough to withstand a couple of hits. Sloped to improve protection and the likelihood of ricochet. Due to the design specifics, it is not subject to field repairs. A frame, mounted around the armor plate, allows for another compartment to be installed above it.

parts.name: S.Trs HA Armor Plate
parts.desc:
Dimensions: 1x1

Armor plate scavenged from Imperial cruisers. Strong enough to withstand a couple of hits. Sloped to improve protection and the likelihood of ricochet. Due to the design specifics, it is not subject to field repairs.

parts.name: S&H Bridge Balcony
parts.desc:
Dimensions: 1x1

One of many ways to improve the trampler's ergonomics. Designed to facilitate movement around the compartments. Lightweight but fragile. This particular model acts as a small bridge, allowing it to cover a 1x1 gap.

parts.name: S.Trs Armored Balcony, Extended L&R
parts.desc:
Dimensions: 3x1

One of many ways to improve the trampler's ergonomics. Designed to facilitate movement around the compartments. Equipped with light armor that will protect against infantry weapons but will not withstand cannon fire. This model extends beyond the dimensions of the standard compartment on both sides to allow for connection to additional balconies.

parts.name: S&H Balcony, Extended L&R
parts.desc:
Dimensions: 3x1

One of many ways to improve the trampler's ergonomics. Designed to facilitate movement around the compartments. Lightweight but fragile. This model extends beyond the dimensions of the standard compartment on both sides to allow for connection to additional balconies.

parts.name: S.Trs Armored Balcony, Inner Corner (L)
parts.desc:
Dimensions: 1x1

One of many ways to improve the trampler's ergonomics. Designed to facilitate movement around the compartments. Equipped with light armor that will protect against infantry weapons but will not withstand cannon fire. This model can be installed in the inner corner between compartments.

One of many ways to improve the trampler's ergonomics. Designed to facilitate movement around the compartments. Lightweight but fragile. This model can be installed in the inner corner between compartments.

Dimensions:1x1

parts.name: S&H Mounted Stairs, Left
parts.desc:
Dimensions: 1x1

Designed to improve the trampler's ergonomics by allowing easier movement between trampler levels. Was commonly used by builders on "Sternenwerft Hofbauer GmbH & Co. KG" tramplers during colonization.

parts.name: S&H Mounted Stairs, Right
parts.desc:
Dimensions: 1x1

Designed to improve the trampler's ergonomics by allowing easier movement between trampler levels. Was commonly used by builders on "Sternenwerft Hofbauer GmbH & Co. KG" tramplers during colonization.

parts.name: S.Trs Captain's Cabin
parts.desc:
Dimensions: 1x1+

A crew compartment specially designed for the trampler's captain. The standard equipment includes a personal refrigerator and reinforced armor. 
The cabin also houses the Trampler Ownership Device, "IO". Crew access to doors and other trampler functions is granted and overwritten exclusively through this device. This modification of the compartment was designed for warships; therefore, it is equipped with additional armor.

parts.name: S&H Captain's Cabin
parts.desc:
Dimensions: 1x1+

A crew compartment specially designed for the trampler's captain. The standard equipment includes a personal refrigerator and reinforced armor. 
The cabin also houses the Trampler Ownership Device, "IO". Crew access to doors and other trampler functions is granted and overwritten exclusively through this device.

parts.name: S.Trs Cargo Bay, L-Shape
parts.desc:
Dimensions: 1x2

A modified version of the S&H cargo bay design, reinforced by armored walls. Even sturdier, but heavier. Was used on military cruisers to transport valuable cargo, such as weapons, spare parts, and even top-secret prototypes.

parts.name: S&H Cargo Bay, L-Shape
parts.desc:
Dimensions: 1x2

A cargo compartment that was used to transport a large number of various goods during long journeys before the cataclysm. Large and sturdy, it can hold quite a lot of things, which is why it is very heavy.

parts.name: S.Trs Cargo Bay, Parallel
parts.desc:
Dimensions: 1x2

A modified version of the S&H cargo bay design, reinforced by armored walls. Even sturdier, but heavier. Was used on military cruisers to transport valuable cargo, such as weapons, spare parts, and even top-secret prototypes.

parts.name: S&H Cargo Bay, Parallel
parts.desc:
Dimensions: 1x2

A cargo compartment that was used to transport a large number of various goods during long journeys before the cataclysm. Large and sturdy, it can hold quite a lot of things, which is why it is very heavy.

parts.name: S&H Cargo Bay, U-Shape
parts.desc:
Dimensions: 1x2

A cargo compartment that was used to transport a large number of various goods during long journeys before the cataclysm. Large and sturdy, it can hold quite a lot of things, which is why it is very heavy.

parts.name: S&H Cargo Deck, Framed L-Shape
parts.desc:
Dimensions: 1x1

A compartment designed for transporting small loads. Ensures that all items placed on its shelves will remain intact during Trampler Deployment and Evacuation. A cheaper version with increased capacity achieved through a complete lack of protection.

parts.name: S.Trs Cargo Compartment, Small L-Shape
parts.desc:
Dimensions: 1x1

A compartment designed for transporting small loads. Has noticeably more armor compared to S&H cargo decks. Ensures that all items placed on its shelves will remain intact during Trampler Deployment and Evacuation. Can hold off a burglar but won't protect your loot from an explosion.

parts.name: S&H Cargo Deck, L-Shape
parts.desc:
Dimensions: 1x1

A compartment designed for transporting small loads. Ensures that all items placed on its shelves will remain intact during Trampler Deployment and Evacuation. A cheaper version with increased capacity achieved through a complete lack of protection.

parts.desc:
Dimensions: 1x1

A compartment designed for transporting small loads. Ensures that all items placed on its shelves will remain intact during Trampler Deployment and Evacuation. An inexpensive option, the increase in capacity comes at the cost of no protection from explosions or burglars.

A compartment designed for transporting small loads. Ensures that all items placed on its shelves will remain intact during Trampler Deployment and Evacuation. Can hold off a burglar but won't protect your loot from an explosion.

parts.name: S&H Cargo Deck, Framed Light
parts.desc:
Dimensions: 1x1

A compartment designed for transporting small loads. Ensures that all items placed on its shelves will remain intact during trampler deployment and evacuation. An inexpensive option, at the cost of no protection from explosions or burglars. A lighter version of the regular cargo deck that has only one rack with shelves.

parts.name: S&H Cargo Deck, Light
parts.desc:
Dimensions: 1x1

A compartment designed for transporting small loads. Ensures that all items placed on its shelves will remain intact during trampler deployment and evacuation. An inexpensive option, at the cost of no protection from explosions or burglars. A lighter version of the regular cargo deck that has only one rack with shelves.

parts.name: KF-Q "Abyss" Royal Chassis
parts.desc:
Dimensions: 5x5

Kaiser's Friends mechanics found out that the chassis can function perfectly well without its central section. However, it takes a few more materials to hold it together. They made sure to fully utilize this newfound discovery on every chassis variation they could lay their hands on.
parts.label: Fortress 5×5 · 6 legs · cargo hatch

parts.name: S.Trs "Albrecht" Royal Chassis
parts.desc:
Dimensions: 5x5

Specially Designed by Seearsenal Neues Triest engineers for the "Albrecht" Military Trampler, a trampler named after Franz Joseph's nephew. It loses in maneuverability to any civilian model but can literally carry a military fort on itself.
parts.label: Fortress 5×5 · 6 legs

parts.name: KF-L "Hole" Middling Chassis
parts.desc:
Dimensions: 3x4

Kaiser's Friends mechanics found out that the chassis can function perfectly well without its central section. However, it takes a few more materials to hold it together. They made sure to fully utilize this newfound discovery on every chassis variation they could lay their hands on.
parts.label: Hauler 3×4 · 4 legs · cargo hatch

parts.name: S&H Atm.Fs 83U-L Middling Chassis
parts.desc:
Dimensions: 3x4

Maintains the perfect balance between maneuverability and carrying capacity. Chassis of this type, due to their extremely versatile design, have been used in many areas, from construction tramplers and cargo carriers to quick and agile military reconnaissance models.
parts.label: Hauler 3×4 · 4 legs

parts.name: KF-L "Trench" Great Chassis
parts.desc:
Dimensions: 3x5

Kaiser's Friends mechanics found out that the chassis can function perfectly well without its central section. However, it takes a few more materials to hold it together. They made sure to fully utilize this newfound discovery on every chassis variation they could lay their hands on.
parts.label: Long Hauler 3×5 · 6 legs · cargo hatch

parts.name: S&H Atm.Fs 79H-L Great Chassis
parts.desc:
Dimensions: 3x5

Made by Sternenwerft Hofbauer GmbH & Co. KG at the request of Sophie's government. It was designed for heavy-duty transporters that carried spacecraft parts. Much less maneuverable compared to smaller models but can withstand extremely high loads.
parts.label: Long Hauler 3×5 · 6 legs

parts.name: KF-L "Abyss" Royal Chassis
parts.desc:
Dimensions: 4x6

Kaiser's Friends mechanics found out that the chassis can function perfectly well without its central section. However, it takes a few more materials to hold it together. They made sure to fully utilize this newfound discovery on every chassis variation they could lay their hands on.
parts.label: Freighter 4×6 · 8 legs · cargo hatch

parts.name: S.Trs "Karl Ludvig" Royal Chassis
parts.desc:
Dimensions: 4x6

Specially designed by Seearsenal Neues Triest engineers for the "Karl Ludvig" Flagman Trampler of Sophie's Military Fleet. It was named after Franz Joseph's brother. It loses in maneuverability to any civilian model but can literally carry a military fort on itself.
parts.label: Freighter 4×6 · 8 legs

parts.name: KF-Q "Trench" Great Chassis
parts.desc:
Dimensions: 4x4

Kaiser's Friends mechanics found out that the chassis can function perfectly well without its central section. However, it takes a few more materials to hold it together. They made sure to fully utilize this newfound discovery on every chassis variation they could lay their hands on.
parts.label: Standard 4×4 · 4 legs · cargo hatch

parts.label: Standard 4×4 · 4 legs

parts.name: KF-Q "Well" Small Chassis
parts.desc:
Dimensions: 3x3

Kaiser's Friends mechanics found out that the chassis can function perfectly well without its central section. However, it takes a few more materials to hold it together. They made sure to fully utilize this newfound discovery on every chassis variation they could lay their hands on.
parts.label: Scout 3×3 · 4 legs · cargo hatch

parts.name: S&H Atm.Fs 77B-Q Small Chassis
parts.desc:
Dimensions: 3x3

Used by small construction tramplers owned by Sternenwerft Hofbauer GmbH & Co. KG. Tramplers built on this chassis are capable of operating in hard-to-reach places due to their compact design and high maneuverability. However, load capacity is not among their strong points.
parts.label: Scout 3×3 · 4 legs

parts.name: S&H Atm.Fs 77B-L Small Chassis
parts.desc:
Dimensions: 2x4

Used by small construction tramplers owned by Sternenwerft Hofbauer GmbH & Co. KG. Tramplers built on this chassis are capable of operating in hard-to-reach places due to their compact design and high maneuverability. However, load capacity is not among their strong points.
parts.label: Mule 2×3 · 4 legs

parts.name: KF-B "Hole" Middling Chassis
parts.desc:
Dimensions: 4x3

Kaiser's Friends mechanics found out that the chassis can function perfectly well without its central section. However, it takes a few more materials to hold it together. They made sure to fully utilize this newfound discovery on every chassis variation they could lay their hands on.
parts.label: Wide 4×3 · 4 legs · cargo hatch

parts.label: Wide 5×3 · 6 legs · cargo hatch

Maintains the perfect balance between maneuverability and carrying capacity. Chassis of this type, due to their extremely versatile design, have been used in many areas, from construction tramplers and cargo carriers to quick and agile military reconnaissance models.

parts.label: Wide 5×3 · 6 legs

parts.name: S.Trs Auxiliary Corridor
parts.desc:
Dimensions: 1x1

A compartment that can be installed to improve the trampler's ergonomics by creating more protected passages between functional compartments. Quite fragile.

parts.name: S&H Auxiliary Corridor
parts.desc:
Dimensions: 1x1

A compartment that can be installed to improve the trampler's ergonomics by creating more protected passages between functional compartments. Quite fragile.

parts.name: S&H Armaments Workbench
parts.desc:
Dimensions: 1x1

Such workshops are an essential part of warships, where they are used to maintain the crew's weapons and ammunition. It has been refitted by scavengers into a full-fledged armory to allow the construction of weapons and ammunition from even the most primitive components found on the planet during expeditions. You might ask, "Why didn't they just use it on the space station?" Well, you can check the Saint Cristopher Station's "Rules of Habitat and Machinery Maintenance" Chapter 5, Article 32, Lines 24 to 32.

parts.name: S&H Compact Armaments Workshop
parts.desc:
Dimensions: 1x1

Such workshops are an essential part of warships, where they are used to maintain the crew's weapons and ammunition. It has been refitted by scavengers into a full-fledged armory to allow the construction of weapons and ammunition from even the most primitive components found on the planet during expeditions. Installed in a more compact compartment for better ergonomics. You might ask, "Why didn't they just use it on the space station?" Well, you can check the Saint Cristopher Station's "Rules of Habitat and Machinery Maintenance" Chapter 5, Article 32, Lines 24 to 32.

parts.name: S&H Armaments Workshop
parts.desc:
Dimensions: 1x2

Such workshops are an essential part of warships, where they are used to maintain the crew's weapons and ammunition. It has been refitted by scavengers into a full-fledged armory to allow the construction of weapons and ammunition from even the most primitive components found on the planet during expeditions. You might ask, "Why didn't they just use it on the space station?" Well, you can check the Saint Cristopher Station's "Rules of Habitat and Machinery Maintenance" Chapter 5, Article 32, Lines 24 to 32.

parts.name: S.Trs MB77e Crew Cabin, 4 People
parts.desc:
Dimensions: 2x2

These cabins were designed to sustain a trampler crew during long journeys. Every new shift starts here. Provides all the necessary means of comfort, including a refrigerator to store provisions and a ventilation system that provides improved air circulation on hot days. This particular design features increased room capacity and can sustain up to four crew members.

parts.name: S&H MK4 Crew Cabin, 4 People
parts.desc:
Dimensions: 2x2

These cabins were designed to sustain a trampler crew during long journeys. Every new shift starts here. Provides all the necessary means of comfort, including a refrigerator to store provisions and a ventilation system that provides improved air circulation on hot days. This particular design features increased room capacity and can sustain up to four crew members.

parts.name: S.Trs K81v Crew Cabin, 2 People
parts.desc:
Dimensions: 1x2

These cabins were designed to sustain a trampler crew during long journeys. Every new shift starts here. Provides all the necessary means of comfort, including a refrigerator to store provisions and a ventilation system that provides improved air circulation on hot days.

parts.desc:
Dimensions: 1x2

These cabins were designed to sustain a trampler crew during long journeys. Every new shift starts here. Provides all the necessary means of comfort, including a refrigerator to store provisions and a ventilation system that provides improved air circulation on hot days.

parts.name: S.Trs MB75 Crew Cabin, Single
parts.desc:
Dimensions: 1x1

These cabins were designed to sustain a trampler crew during long journeys. Every new shift starts here. Provides all the necessary means of comfort, including a refrigerator to store provisions and a ventilation system that provides improved air circulation on hot days. The compact model is designed for personal use.

parts.name: S&H MK1 Crew Cabin, Single
parts.desc:
Dimensions: 1x1

These cabins were designed to sustain a trampler crew during long journeys. Every new shift starts here. Provides all the necessary means of comfort, including a refrigerator to store provisions and a ventilation system that provides improved air circulation on hot days. The compact model is designed for personal use.

parts.name: Cruising Accelerator
parts.desc:
Dimensions: 1x3

An engineering marvel of the Austro-Hungarian Empire. Significantly increases the trampler's top speed ​​and acceleration for a short period of time. Due to its experimental design and rather fragile construction, it is prone to malfunction and will require manual restarting from even the lightest impact.

parts.name: S&H Deck, Round-Beveled
parts.desc:
Dimensions: 2x1

A platform that improves the trampler's ergonomics. Provides more comfortable navigation on the roofs of compartments. Equipped with railings to prevent the crew from falling overboard or unauthorized persons from entering. Can only be installed on top of load-bearing structures like chassis and solid compartments.

parts.name: S&H Deck, Round-Beveled
parts.desc:
Dimensions: 2x1

A platform that improves the trampler's ergonomics. Provides more comfortable navigation on the roofs of compartments. Equipped with railings to prevent the crew from falling overboard or unauthorized persons from entering. Can only be installed on top of load-bearing structures like chassis and solid compartments.

parts.desc:
Dimensions: 1x1

A platform that improves the trampler's ergonomics. Provides more comfortable navigation on the roofs of compartments. Equipped with railings to prevent the crew from falling overboard or unauthorized persons from entering. Can only be installed on top of load-bearing structures like chassis and solid compartments.

Dimensions: 1x1

Equipped with railings to prevent the crew from falling overboard or unauthorized persons from entering. Can only be installed on top of load-bearing structures like chassis and solid compartments.

parts.desc:
Dimensions: 1x2

A platform that improves the trampler's ergonomics. Provides more comfortable navigation on the roofs of compartments. Equipped with railings to prevent the crew from falling overboard or unauthorized persons from entering. Can only be installed on top of load-bearing structures like chassis and solid compartments.

parts.desc:
Dimensions: 1x1

A platform that improves the trampler's ergonomics. Provides more comfortable navigation on the roofs of compartments. Equipped with railings to prevent the crew from falling overboard or unauthorized persons from entering. Can only be installed on top of load-bearing structures like chassis and solid compartments.

parts.name: S&H Deck, Round
parts.desc:
Dimensions: 2x1

A platform that improves the trampler's ergonomics. Provides more comfortable navigation on the roofs of compartments. Equipped with railings to prevent the crew from falling overboard or unauthorized persons from entering. Can only be installed on top of load-bearing structures like chassis and solid compartments.

parts.name: S.Trs Armored Deck
parts.desc:
Dimensions: 1x1

Platform that improves the trampler's ergonomics. Provides more comfortable navigation on the roofs of compartments. Equipped with railings to prevent the crew from falling overboard or unauthorized persons from entering. Can only be installed on top of load-bearing structures like chassis and solid compartments. A militarized version of the S&H design, improved with a reinforced floor and armored railings to provide cover during gunfights.

parts.name: S.Trs Armored Deck (no railings)
parts.desc:
Dimensions: 1x1

A platform that improves the trampler's ergonomics, it provides more comfortable navigation on the roofs of compartments. It can only be installed on top of load-bearing structures like chassis and solid compartments. A militarized version of the S&H design, improved with a reinforced floor. This particular model comes with the railings removed.

parts.name: S&H Canopy Deck
parts.desc:
Dimensions: 1x2

A simple set of decks covered with a canopy. Protects your head from the harsh heat of Sophie or anything that falls from above.

parts.name: S.Trs Armored Frame
parts.desc:
Dimensions: 1x1

An additional load-bearing frame that allows the placement of decks without blocking the space below them. More lightweight than solid compartments but more fragile. A militarized version of the S&H design, improved with a reinforced floor and armored railings to provide cover during gunfights.

parts.name: S&H Framed Stairs
parts.desc:
Dimensions: 1x1

Stairs attached to a frame, making the traversal between trampler levels easier. This model provides more space for walking and is a bit sturdier than mounted stairs.

parts.name: S&H Supporting Frame
parts.desc:
Dimensions: 1x1

An additional load-bearing frame that allows the placement of decks without blocking the space below them. More lightweight than solid compartments but more fragile.

parts.name: S&H Deck, Standard (no railings)
parts.desc:
Dimensions: 1x1

A platform that improves the trampler's ergonomics, it provides more comfortable navigation on the roofs of compartments. It can only be installed on top of load-bearing structures like chassis and solid compartments. This particular model comes with the railings removed.

parts.name: S&H Deck, Standard
parts.desc:
Dimensions: 1x1

A platform that improves the trampler's ergonomics. Provides more comfortable navigation on the roofs of compartments. Equipped with railings to prevent the crew from falling overboard or unauthorized persons from entering. Can only be installed on top of load-bearing structures like chassis and solid compartments.

parts.name: S.Trs Armored Frame, Triangle
parts.desc:
Dimensions: 1x1

An additional load-bearing frame that allows the placement of decks without blocking the space below them. More lightweight than solid compartments but more fragile. A militarized version of the S&H design, improved with a reinforced floor and armored railings to provide cover during gunfights.

parts.name: S&H Supporting Frame, Triangle
parts.desc:
Dimensions: 1x1

An additional load-bearing frame that allows the placement of decks without blocking the space below them. More lightweight than solid compartments but more fragile.

parts.name: KF "Nest" Framed Armored Turret Deck
parts.desc:
Dimensions: 1x1

The lower support of a gun carriage, mounted on a reinforced deck. Designed to accommodate the full range of available artillery weapons. Engineers from the Kaiser's Friends gang additionally equipped it with a supporting frame, which allows other compartments to be installed on it, and armored railings to provide cover during gunfights.

parts.name: NZ Mb3 Maneuver Engine, Medium
parts.desc:
Dimensions: 1x2

Used on heavy-duty transporters to improve chassis maneuverability when transporting extremely heavy loads. This model is increased in size and features a built-in exhaust pipe. These modifications are able to provide a considerable boost to chassis performance.

parts.name: NZ Mb2k Maneuver Engine, Small
parts.desc:
Dimensions: 1x1

Specifically designed for small-sized tramplers operating in narrow places. Despite its small size, it is still able to moderately improve chassis maneuverability. It doesn't require an individual exhaust pipe.

parts.name: NZ MAk-2 Medical Bay
parts.desc:
Dimensions: 1x1

A matter enricher prototype from Neue Zukunft, designed to grow terrestrial plants that did not adapt well to growing in Sophie's ecosystem. Later, some curious marauders discovered that it can be used to heal even critical wounds. However, do not expect it to restore a lost limb or resurrect the dead; even innovative technology has its limitations.

parts.name: NZ AzE81S Motor-Reactor, Framed Long
parts.desc:
Dimensions: 1x3

The heart of the trampler. Provides power to all compartments of the trampler and its chassis. Created by Neue Zukunft, the motor-reactor converts aurogen from energy rods into huge amounts of energy. Destroying the reactor will cause a chain reaction throughout the whole trampler, detonating most of its compartments and rendering it completely inoperable. It has been further modified by Kaiser's Friends to be able to carry other compartments on top of the frames installed on this compartment.

parts.name: NZ AzE82 Motor-Reactor, Armored
parts.desc:
Dimensions: 1x3

The heart of the trampler. Provides power to all compartments of the trampler and its chassis. Created by Neue Zukunft, the motor-reactor converts aurogen from energy rods into huge amounts of energy. Destroying the reactor will cause a chain reaction throughout the whole trampler, detonating most of its compartments and rendering it completely inoperable. This model features additional armor plates installed at Seearsenal Neues Triest factories, allowing this compartment to be installed on Imperial military tramplers.

Dimensions: 1x3

The heart of the trampler. Provides power to all compartments of the trampler and its chassis. Created by Neue Zukunft, the motor-reactor converts aurogen from energy rods into huge amounts of energy. Destroying the reactor will cause a chain reaction throughout the whole trampler, detonating most of its compartments and rendering it completely inoperable. This model is enclosed in a solid compartment to protect it from any debris falling on the reactor during construction work.

parts.name: S.Trs M78v Embrasure
parts.desc:
Dimensions: 1x1

The basic embrasure that was installed on most Imperial military tramplers in Sophie's military fleet. It provides decent cover for a soldier inside along with a good arc of fire to defend the trampler from approaching infantry.

parts.name: S&H Fortified Entrance Area
parts.desc:
Dimensions: 1x1

A crucial part of any trampler. The ladder significantly eases the process of climbing onto the trampler. Solid walls and roof not only increase protection, but also allow for the installation of additional compartments on top.

parts.name: S.Trs Entrance Vestibule
parts.desc:
Dimensions: 1x1

A crucial part of any trampler. The ladder significantly eases the process of climbing onto the trampler. A fully enclosed entrance with a vestibule provides enhanced security measures. This compartment cannot be installed on top of other compartments or chassis, as the access hatch with the ladder is mounted in its lower deck.

parts.name: S&H Entrance Area
parts.desc:
Dimensions: 1x1

A crucial part of any trampler. The ladder significantly eases the process of climbing onto the trampler.

parts.name: S&H Entrance Vestibule
parts.desc:
Dimensions: 1x1

A crucial part of any trampler. The ladder significantly eases the process of climbing onto the trampler. A fully enclosed entrance with a vestibule provides enhanced security measures. This compartment cannot be installed on top of other compartments or chassis, as the access hatch with the ladder is mounted in its lower deck.

parts.name: S&H M78 Framed Steering Deck
parts.desc:
Dimensions: 1x2

S&H engineers have combined every trampler movement control into one module, making it a universal control point. Marching, turning, sidestep, emergency brake. They even installed a horn! This version has improved ergonomics and allows you to install other compartments on top of it.

parts.name: S.Trs K81v Pilot Bridge
parts.desc:
Dimensions: 1x2

S&H engineers have combined every trampler movement control into one module, making it a universal control point. Marching, turning, sidestep, emergency brake. They even installed a horn! This modification has additional layers of armor and was commissioned by the Imperial Army for installation on Imperial military tramplers.

parts.name: S&H M78l Flybridge
parts.desc:
Dimensions: 1x2

S&H engineers have combined every trampler movement control into one module, making it a universal control point. Marching, turning, sidestep, emergency brake. They even installed a horn!

parts.name: KF "Kormylo" Wheelhouse
parts.desc:
Dimensions: 1x2

The helm stripped from the civilian vessel and mounted on the Trampler Deck. One of the basic modifications that Kaiser's Friends Gang can provide for the Scavengers that work with them.

parts.name: S&H M78r Framed Steering Deck
parts.desc:
Dimensions: 2x1

S&H engineers have combined every trampler movement control into one module, making it a universal control point. Marching, turning, sidestep, emergency brake. They even installed a horn! This version has improved ergonomics and allows you to install other compartments on top of it.

parts.desc:
Dimensions: 2x1

S&H engineers have combined every trampler movement control into one module, making it a universal control point. Marching, turning, sidestep, emergency brake. They even installed a horn! This modification has additional layers of armor and was commissioned by the Imperial Army for installation on Imperial military tramplers.

parts.desc:
Dimensions: 2x1

S&H engineers have combined every trampler movement control into one module, making it a universal control point. Marching, turning, sidestep, emergency brake. They even installed a horn!

parts.name: S&H M78k Framed Steering Deck
parts.desc:
Dimensions: 1x1

S&H engineers have combined every trampler movement control into one module, making it a universal control point. Marching, turning, sidestep, emergency brake. They even installed a horn! This version is more compact, has improved ergonomics and allows you to install other compartments on top of it.

parts.name: S&H M78k Flybridge
parts.desc:
Dimensions: 1x1

S&H engineers have combined every trampler movement control into one compact module, making it a universal control point. Marching, turning, sidestep, emergency brake. They even installed a horn!

parts.name: S&H Lower Supporting Frame Extended (L&R)
parts.desc:
Dimensions: 1x3

Supporting frames that were designed to be mounted on walls to support decks and other structures above them. They were often used on Sternenwerft Hofbauer GmbH & Co. KG tramplers to save space and make them more maneuverable on construction sites.

parts.desc:
Dimensions: 1x2

Supporting frames that were designed to be mounted on walls to support decks and other structures above them. They were often used on Sternenwerft Hofbauer GmbH & Co. KG tramplers to save space and make them more maneuverable on construction sites.

parts.name: KF "Prolomnyk" Battering Ram
parts.desc:
Dimensions: 2x2

The bow section stripped from the icebreaker. You might ask whether a tropical planet had ice. Who knows?

parts.name: KF "Nest" Framed Turret Deck
parts.desc:
Dimensions: 1x1

The lower support of the gun carriage, mounted on a reinforced deck. Designed to accommodate the full range of available artillery weapons.. Engineers from the Kaiser's Friends gang additionally equipped it with a supporting frame, which allows other compartments to be installed on it.

parts.name: S.Trs Armored Turret Deck, Corner
parts.desc:
Dimensions: 1x1

The lower support of a gun carriage, mounted on a reinforced deck. Designed to accommodate the full range of available artillery weapons. Additionally equipped with armored railings to provide cover during gunfights.

parts.name: S.Trs Armored Turret Deck
parts.desc:
Dimensions: 1x1

The lower support of a gun carriage, mounted on a reinforced deck. Designed to accommodate the full range of available artillery weapons. Additionally equipped with armored railings to provide cover during gunfights.

parts.name: SGOW Universal casemate
parts.desc:
Dimensions: 1x1

One of the prototypes created by SGOW for the flagship Imperial cruisers. It combines the ability to install any type of artillery weapons with a protected gun mount to shield its crew from enemy shots and explosions. However, such protection comes at a price: the gun has a smaller arc of fire compared to the deck model, it costs the same as a small ship, and refuses to work without external power.

parts.name: S.Trs Turret Deck, Corner
parts.desc:
Dimensions: 1x1

The lower support of a gun carriage, mounted on a reinforced deck. Designed to accommodate the full range of available artillery weapons.

parts.name: S.Trs Wide Armored Turret Deck
parts.desc:
Dimensions: 2x1

The lower support of a gun carriage, mounted on a reinforced deck. Designed to accommodate the full range of available artillery weapons. The wide deck improves the working conditions of the gun crew, but takes up more space. Additionally equipped with armored railings to provide cover during gunfights.

parts.name: S.Trs Turret Deck
parts.desc:
Dimensions: 1x1

The lower support of the gun carriage, mounted on a reinforced deck. Designed to accommodate the full range of available artillery weapons.

parts.desc:

The lower support of the gun carriage, mounted on a reinforced deck. Designed to accommodate the full range of available artillery weapons. The wide deck improves the working conditions of the gun crew, but takes up more space.
